gloss_record.canonical_gloss: Function: A Function is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
gloss_record.concise_form: Function: A Function is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of function as a Function is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
gloss_record.expert_form: Function denotes a Function is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, function usually signals a function concept with provenance from OntoMathPRO.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Strong merge candidate; exact IRIs still need to be recorded OntoMathPRO class mathematics:E1505 has direct rdfs:label Function@en; selected as canonical IRI according to Week 2 rules Need to add MathModDB/OpenMath identifiers later if exact matches are confirmed Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical OntoMathPRO link.

gloss_record.canonical_gloss: Variable: A Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.concise_form: Variable: A Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of variable as a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.expert_form: Variable denotes a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, variable usually signals a scalar concept with provenance from OntoMathPRO; MathModDB.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Mathematical role in expressions and models; exact IRIs still need to be recorded MathModDB contains DecisionVariable as a variable-related source IRI; selected as provisional source IRI for Variable because no clean general Variable class was found in the available seed sources Provisional specialized mapping; review later if a general Variable source IRI is found Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical MathModDB link. Variable is retained as a provisional or specialized mapping where the source ontology evidence may not be a clean general-purpose concept match.

gloss_record.canonical_gloss: Equality: An Equality is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected.
gloss_record.concise_form: Equality: An Equality is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected.
gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of equality as an Equality is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected.
gloss_record.expert_form: Equality denotes an Equality is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, equality usually signals a relation concept with provenance from OpenMath; OntoMathEdu; MathModDB.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Core mathematical relation; verify exact non-OpenMath source label before marking fully verified OpenMath Official relation1 Content Dictionary includes eq as the equality relation symbol; selected as canonical source because no safer OntoMathPRO exact class was confirmed Exact OpenMath relation match found; later check whether OntoMathPRO has an equivalent relation class before adding owl:equivalentClass Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical OpenMath link.

gloss_record.canonical_gloss: Subtraction: A Subtraction is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result.
gloss_record.concise_form: Subtraction: A Subtraction is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result.
gloss_record.pedagogical_form: Think of subtraction as a Subtraction is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result.
gloss_record.expert_form: Subtraction denotes a Subtraction is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result.
gloss_record.document_role_form: In a mathematical document, subtraction usually signals a operator concept with provenance from OpenMath; OntoMathPRO.
gloss_record.accessibility_note: Basic arithmetic operation; verify exact OntoMathPRO/OntoMathEdu label OpenMath Official arith1 Content Dictionary includes minus as the binary subtraction symbol; selected as canonical source because no safer OntoMathPRO exact class was confirmed Exact OpenMath operation match found; later check whether OntoMathPRO has an equivalent operation class before adding owl:equivalentClass Confirmed mapped in seed ontology with canonical OpenMath link.

speech_text: LaTeX expression: f(x) = x^2 - 1. Think of function as a Function is a mathematical function concept that associates inputs with outputs according to a rule. Think of variable as a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Think of equality as an Equality is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected. Think of subtraction as a Subtraction is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result.
